title: Gulf states caught in the crossfire as Iran strikes cities, ports and oil facilities
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

01:41 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 16:22
summary: Iran stepped up its attacks on economic targets and US missions across the Middle East on Tuesday as President Donald Trump warned it was "too late" for the Islamic republic to seek talks to escape the war. As drones and missiles crashed into oil facilities and US embassies in the Gulf, Washington's ally Israel bombarded targets in Iran and pushed troops deeper into Lebanon to battle the Tehran-backed militia Hezbollah.
